data.title: Milestone 3: model_profiles client + manual tool loop + router + POST /ask

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): PASS. Verified 4bddcdc live: ruff clean, mypy clean (13 files), pytest 28 passed in 0.64s — grep-confirmed no test can make a real Anthropic/web call (always FakeModel; web_search returns 'unavailable' w/o key). Scrutiny: manual loop appends assistant tool_use content + exactly one tool_result per tool_use id before re-calling (no API 400 possible); broker() is the only tool path (loop never imports private tool fns; anthropic_tool_defs only declares); model_client uses Anthropic().messages.create with client-side tools only — no Agent SDK/server tools/betas; budget check is BEFORE each model call, returns truncated partial (not raising), ctx.max_cost_per_run set from profile (M2 footgun fixed); budget test arithmetic correct (2 calls then stop); dispatch_route overrides model (conf<0.6->clarify, high->refuse); SAP pre-check needs BOTH sap-keyword AND review-word (low false-positive); system prompts fixed per-route constants, tool output only as tool_result data; Denied surfaced to model as text; model IDs current + prices marked PLACEHOLDER/VERIFY; price() math correct. No secrets, no scope creep (SAP_REVIEW=GENERAL+TODO M4; no trace persistence; no write tool). Test asserts read & confirmed. 3 forward-looking nits (classifier cost -> M5; needs_approval unused; local_private no pricing) — none blocking. -> done.
